name: Piroshiki for Bread Makers
recipeInstructions:
1. REMOVE DOUGH FROM BREAD MAKER and cover with wrap; let sit for 20 to 30 minutes.
2. CUT the dough into 10 portions and roll each by hand into a small ball. Cover with a clean cloth and let them sit for 15 minutes.
3. FRY onion in butter until softened, then add minced meat and cook until the meat is no longer pink. Add boiled eggs and peas; season with salt and pepper.
4. ROLL each piece of dough into an oblong shape using a rolling pin.
5. PLACE the filling on the dough, leaving about 1 inch around the edge for sealing.
6. PLACE the formed dough on a greased oven tray. SPRAY ENOUGH WATER to prevent burning, then let the dough rise in the oven set at yeast-rising temperature (usually around 90-100°C) for 30 to 40 minutes.
7. DEEP FAT FRY the piroshiki at 350°F (175°C) until golden brown.
